title: aubletia ferruginea
intro: Aubletia ferruginea, also known as the rusty Aubletia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a shrub that grows up to 2 meters in height and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, wounds, and respiratory problems. The leaves and roots of the plant can be used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
